zh.lifeSummary: 當King Niall 'Og' O'Neill於大約1367年出生時，他的父親Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone29歲，母親Benmee MacMahon29歲。他於大約1386年與Agnes O'Neill在愛爾蘭武爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1403年在愛爾蘭庫迪 高威泰龍享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Niall 'Og' O'Neill于大约1367年出生时，他的父亲Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone29岁，母亲Benmee MacMahon29岁。他于大约1386年与Agnes O'Neill在爱尔兰武爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1403年在爱尔兰庫迪 高威泰龍享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: 'Og'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alphonse, Gesner, Jacques.
French (Ogé): variant of Ogier or Auger (compare Auge ) and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter. The surname Ogé is also found in Haiti.
Turkish (Öge, also Öğe): ornamental name or nickname from regional öge ‘genius’, or from its archaic homonym meaning ‘fame’.

variants.name: Ogier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Jacques.
French and English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Ogier, from ancient Germanic Audagari, composed of the elements audha- ‘wealth, power’ + gaira- ‘lance, spear’.
French: variant of Augier, itself a variant of Auger .

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: O'Neall
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: O'Neal
meanings: Irish (Longford, Down): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: O'Niel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.
Irish (Mayo, Tipperary): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .
English: variant of   Neal  .

variants.name: O'Neel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

nameMeanings.name: Niall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of disputed derivation; it may mean ‘cloud’, ‘passionate’, or perhaps ‘champion’. It was adopted by the Scandinavians in the form Njal and soon became very popular among them. From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, it has been strongly revived among non-Gaelic speakers since the latter part of the 20th century.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: Variant spelling of   Neil .

variants.name: Neale
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

en.lifeSummary: When King Niall 'Og' O'Neill was born about 1367, his father, Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone, was 29 and his mother, Benmee MacMahon, was 29. He married Agnes O'Neill about 1386, in Ulster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1403, in Tyrone, County Galway, Ireland, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Niall 'Og' O'Neill est né environ 1367, son père, Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Benmee MacMahon, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes O'Neill environ 1386, à Ulster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1403, à Tyrone, County Galway, Irlande, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Niall 'Og' O'Neill um 1367 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone 29 und seine Mutter Benmee MacMahon 29. Er hat um 1386 in Ulster, Irland Agnes O'Neill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1403 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Tyrone, County Galway, Irland.

Lui sposato Agnes O'Neill circa 1386, nel Ulster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1403, nel Tyrone, County Galway, Irlanda, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: King Niall 'Og' O'Neill(이)가 대략 1367년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Benmee MacMahon(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1386년 아일랜드 울스터에서 Agnes O'Neill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1403년 아일랜드 카운티 갈웨이 타이론에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Niall 'Og' O'Neill родился около 1367 г., его отцу по имени Niall Mór "The Big" O'Neill - of Tyrone было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Benmee MacMahon, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes O'Neill около 1386 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1403 г. в местности тироун, коунти галвеи, Ирландия в возрасте 37 лет.
